shell.htmlDescription: Upload IRS and federal notices. Get plain-English explanations, deadlines, and next steps. Not tax advice.
shell.accessDeniedDesc: This page is only available to the system owner.

field.name: Full name
field.signature: I confirm the information is accurate

formFiller.fillFieldsBelow: Fill in the fields below. This assistant does not file with the IRS for you.
formFiller.pdfSoon: PDF download from the app is not wired yet — use the official PDF or print.
formFiller.footerHint: This is a drafting aid only. Always verify deadlines, amounts, and line items against your notice and official IRS instructions. For tax advice, consult a qualified professional.

legalPanel.lawsDesc: Verify details using the official sources below
legalPanel.footerDisclaimer: Always confirm amounts, deadlines, and citations against your notice and current IRS publications. This is not tax advice.

uploadPage.title: Upload a document
uploadPage.subtitle: Upload a PDF or image for analysis — processing usually takes 30–60 seconds.
uploadPage.previewCheck: Check cropping and readability before uploading

uploadPage.processingWait: Still working on it. Complex documents may take longer.
uploadPage.fileTypeError: Only PDF or images (JPG, PNG, HEIC), max 20MB
uploadPage.imageOptimizeWarn: Image optimization failed — using original file
uploadPage.consentPrefix: By uploading you agree to our
uploadPage.securityNote: Security: TLS in transit, role-based access, logged processing.
uploadPage.tooltipHelp: Upload a PDF or image (JPG, PNG, HEIC). Analysis usually takes 30–60 seconds.
uploadPage.analysisTimeoutToast: Analysis is taking too long. Check your archive later.

resultPage.title: Analysis results
resultPage.subtitle: Detailed breakdown and next steps
resultPage.tabTooltip: Plain English uses everyday language. Legal detail is more formal and cites laws only when they appear in your letter.

landing.tagline1: Got a confusing notice in the mail?
landing.tagline2: Upload it and we'll tell you what it means, what to do, and
landing.step1Desc: Upload a PDF or photo of your IRS, state, or agency letter
landing.step2Desc: AI extracts deadlines, amounts, and what the letter means
landing.step4Desc: Suggested IRS and agency forms, everything stored in one place
landing.benefitsTitle: Built for U.S. tax and agency mail
landing.benefitSecureDesc: Your documents stay in your account with industry-standard encryption
landing.benefitFastDesc: Most notices analyzed in about a minute
landing.benefitDeadlinesDesc: See due dates clearly so nothing slips through
landing.benefitArchiveDesc: Every upload and analysis in one searchable place
landing.benefitFormsDesc: Links to official PDFs and drafting help for common responses
landing.benefitStatesDesc: IRS notices plus state tax and agency letters across all 50 states
landing.solIrsDesc: CP14, CP2000, levy warnings, and more
landing.solStateDesc: Balance due, audit, and refund offset mail
landing.solFaqDesc: How upload, analysis, and privacy work
landing.cmpChatgptDesc: General AI vs a workflow built for official mail
landing.cmpBillingoDesc: Outgoing invoicing vs understanding letters you receive
landing.cmpSzamlazzDesc: Hungarian invoicing vs U.S. notice interpretation
landing.ctaSubtitle: Less jargon—clear next steps in minutes
landing.ctaDisclaimer: GovLetter is an informational AI assistant, not tax or legal advice.
